Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process model normative rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If rejected close without Finalize Documentation Desiderata Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call sometime before Close Case encouraged not required

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 2024 01 10 09 00 Application Received 09 30 Credit Check 30 min after application within 24h 10 00 Risk Assessment after credit check 11 00 Loan Decision Approved after risk assessment 13 00 Inform Applicant 2 hours after decision within 48h 13 30 Finalize Documentation approved before close 14 00 Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 fully complies with normative rules and meets the timing desiderata only the optional follow up call is not recorded a very minor deviation or possibly performed but not logged

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 08 00 Application Received 08 20 Risk Assessment BEFORE Credit Check violates Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment 09 00 Credit Check occurs after Risk Assessment order violation 09 30 Loan Decision Rejected 10 00 Finalize Documentation after a rejection violates do not finalize documentation after rejection 10 30 Close Case also missing Inform Applicant the normative sequence requires Inform Applicant after Loan Decision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So Case 2 violations 1 Risk Assessment before Credit Check order violation effectively skipped credit check at time of assessment 2 Missing Inform Applicant skipped activity 3 Finalize Documentation after rejection contradictory action 4 Consequently Close Case occurs without proper decision logic followed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 2024 01 12 09 00 Application Received 2024 01 14 10 00 Credit Check 49 hours later violates 24h desideratum not normative 2024 01 14 11 00 Risk Assessment order correct 2024 01 14 12 00 Loan Decision Approved 2024 01 16 15 00 Inform Applicant 51 hours later violates 48h desideratum 2024 01 17 09 00 Finalize Documentation approved before close 2024 01 17 10 00 Close Case No Follow up Call desideratum deviation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So Case 3 fully normative compliant in sequence and decision logic only desiderata deviations credit check delayed more than 24h inform applicant delayed more than 48h no follow up call

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Maybe the risk assessment was a preliminary screening or the credit check was recorded late due to system logging delay timestamp issue The finalize documentation after rejection could be a data entry error or finalize documentation might mean archiving rejection paperwork different semantics Missing Inform Applicant could mean notification was sent through another channel not logged Alternatively the case could be a test training case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 delays could be due to weekends holidays business hours interpretation backlog applicant unavailable third party credit bureau delay Missing follow up call applicant may have declined or call not logged in system or case handled fully digitally
